summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of InsureHub landing page. All 8 specified features tested and working perfectly including hero section, features cards, AI insights, navigation buttons, and smooth scroll functionality.
passed_tests: Landing page loads at root URL when not logged in
Hero section displays with 'Health Endorsement Made Intelligent' headline
Features section shows Member Additions card
Features section shows Member Deletions card
Features section shows Data Corrections card
AI Insights section displays with proper heading
Get Started Free button navigates to login form
Login button in header navigates to login form
Back to Home link returns to landing page
Features navigation link smooth scroll functionality
AI Insights navigation link smooth scroll functionality
Testimonials navigation link smooth scroll functionality
All data-testid attributes present for automation
